name: Bybit
pros: One of the highest welcome bonus packages
Wide range of crypto products including copy trading
cons: KYC required for full bonus access
Not available in US, UK and Canada
requirements: New users must register, complete KYC, deposit funds and meet trading volume requirements to unlock the full bonus amount. Bonus is distributed in tiers.
riskNotes: Bonus terms may change without notice. Always check official promotion page before claiming. Crypto trading involves significant risk.
shortDescription: Bybit offers one of the most competitive crypto welcome bonus packages with up to 30,000 USDT for new users who deposit and trade.
longDescription: Bybit is a major global crypto exchange known for derivatives, spot trading, copy trading and aggressive promotional campaigns. Founded in 2018, Bybit offers a wide range of trading products including futures, options, and a growing spot market. Their welcome bonus for new users is among the highest in the industry, though it requires meeting deposit and trading volume milestones to unlock the full amount.

name: MEXC
pros: No KYC required for basic access
No deposit required for initial bonus
Huge selection of altcoins and new listings
cons: Smaller bonus amount compared to Bybit
Some bonus features require trading activity
requirements: Register with email or phone. No KYC required for basic trading. Some bonuses require completing tasks like trading a minimum volume.
riskNotes: Bonus conditions and availability may change. MEXC lists many low-cap altcoins which carry higher volatility risk. Always read official terms.
shortDescription: MEXC offers a no-KYC-required signup bonus of up to 1,000 USDT, making it one of the most accessible exchanges for new users.
longDescription: MEXC is a global crypto exchange known for its extensive altcoin listings and relatively low KYC requirements. Founded in 2018, MEXC is popular among traders looking for early access to new token listings. Their welcome bonus is accessible without identity verification, making it attractive for users in regions with limited KYC options.

name: OKX
pros: Reputable tier-1 exchange with strong track record
cons: Not available in the US, UK, Canada or India
KYC and deposit required for full rewards
requirements: New users register, complete identity verification, make a qualifying deposit and trade to unlock mystery box rewards. Specific amounts depend on deposit and trading tiers.
riskNotes: Mystery box rewards are randomized and not guaranteed. Trading volume requirements apply. Always verify current promotion terms on the official OKX website.
shortDescription: OKX rewards new users with mystery boxes worth up to 10,000 USDT, unlocked through deposits and trading activity on one of the industry's most trusted platforms.
longDescription: OKX is a top-tier global crypto exchange offering spot, futures, options, DeFi and Web3 products. Known for strong liquidity, advanced trading tools and a growing ecosystem. Their welcome promotion uses a mystery box mechanic where new users receive randomized rewards based on deposit and trading milestones, adding a gamified element to the onboarding experience.

name: Bitget
bonusTitle: Up to 6,200 USDT New User Bonus
cons: Not available in US, UK, Canada
requirements: Complete registration and KYC verification. Deposit qualifying amount and complete trading tasks to unlock bonus tiers up to 6,200 USDT.
riskNotes: Bonus amounts are conditional on meeting deposit and trading milestones. Terms subject to change. Futures trading carries high risk of loss.
shortDescription: Bitget offers new users up to 6,200 USDT in welcome bonuses with a strong focus on copy trading and futures markets.
longDescription: Bitget is a globally recognized crypto exchange specializing in derivatives and copy trading. With over 20 million users, Bitget is known for its copy trading feature that lets users automatically replicate trades from professional traders. Their welcome package rewards new users through tiered deposit and trading milestones.

name: BingX
cons: Smaller trading volume than top exchanges
requirements: Register, complete KYC and deposit to unlock welcome bonus tiers. Trading activity required to fully unlock rewards.
riskNotes: Bonus conditions and amounts may vary by region. Trading involves significant risk. Read official promotion terms before claiming.
shortDescription: BingX provides a beginner-friendly welcome bonus of up to 5,000 USDT with social and copy trading features ideal for new crypto users.
longDescription: BingX is a crypto exchange with a focus on social and copy trading, making it popular with beginners and intermediate traders. Founded in 2018, BingX has grown to serve millions of users globally. Their welcome promotion rewards new users with deposit-based bonus tiers and trading vouchers.

name: Gate.io
pros: One of the largest altcoin selections
cons: Interface can be complex for beginners
requirements: Register and complete KYC. Deposit qualifying amount and complete tasks to earn signup bonus rewards up to 3,000 USDT.
riskNotes: Gate.io lists many altcoins with high volatility. Bonus conditions may change. Always check official promotion terms.
shortDescription: Gate.io offers new users up to 3,000 USDT in welcome rewards on one of the largest and most established crypto exchanges by altcoin selection.
longDescription: Gate.io is one of the oldest crypto exchanges, founded in 2013. Known for its enormous selection of altcoins and trading pairs, Gate.io appeals to experienced traders looking for diverse market exposure. Their welcome bonus is accessible to new users who complete KYC and deposit qualifying amounts.

name: KuCoin
pros: No KYC required for basic trading
cons: Lower bonus amount compared to top competitors
requirements: Register and deposit to unlock welcome bonus. KYC not required for basic access. Bonus tiers unlock based on deposit and trading volume.
riskNotes: Bonus amounts and conditions subject to change. KuCoin is not licensed in all jurisdictions. Check availability in your region before registering.
shortDescription: KuCoin offers a no-KYC welcome bonus of up to 500 USDT, making it popular with traders who prefer accessing crypto markets without full identity verification.
longDescription: KuCoin is a major global crypto exchange known as 'The People's Exchange' for its accessible approach including optional KYC. Founded in 2017, KuCoin serves over 30 million users worldwide with spot, futures, lending and staking products. Their welcome bonus caters to users who want quick access without identity verification requirements.

name: HTX
bonusTitle: Up to 2,000 USDT New User Rewards
cons: Not available in several major markets
Rebranding from Huobi may cause confusion
requirements: Complete registration and KYC. Deposit and trade to unlock reward tiers up to 2,000 USDT. Specific tasks vary by current promotion.
riskNotes: HTX was formerly known as Huobi. Bonus terms and regional availability may change. Always verify current promotion terms on the official website.
shortDescription: HTX (formerly Huobi) offers new users up to 2,000 USDT in welcome rewards on one of the longest-running crypto exchanges in the industry.
longDescription: HTX, formerly known as Huobi Global, is one of the oldest crypto exchanges founded in 2013. After rebranding to HTX in 2023, the exchange continues to serve a large global user base particularly strong in Asian markets. Their welcome bonuses target new users through deposit and trading milestones.

name: CoinEx
cons: Limited payment methods compared to larger exchanges
requirements: Register to receive signup reward. No KYC required for basic access. Deposit bonuses require qualifying deposit amounts.
riskNotes: CoinEx has lower trading volumes which may affect liquidity for some pairs. Bonus terms subject to change.
shortDescription: CoinEx offers an accessible signup bonus of up to 500 USDT with no KYC requirement, ideal for users seeking a simple entry into crypto trading.
longDescription: CoinEx is a global crypto exchange founded in 2017 with a focus on simplicity and accessibility. Supporting hundreds of trading pairs with competitive fees, CoinEx appeals to users who prefer trading without identity verification requirements. Their welcome bonus is available immediately upon registration.

name: Phemex
pros: High bonus ceiling for futures traders
cons: High bonus requires significant deposit and futures trading
Not available in US, UK, Canada
requirements: Register and deposit qualifying amounts. Futures trading required to unlock higher bonus tiers. Up to 8,800 USDT available through deposit and trading milestones.
riskNotes: Futures trading involves the risk of losing more than your initial investment. High bonus amounts require significant trading activity. Always read official terms.
shortDescription: Phemex targets futures traders with a bonus of up to 8,800 USDT, combining no-KYC access with high-ceiling rewards for active derivatives traders.
longDescription: Phemex is a derivatives-focused crypto exchange founded in 2019 by former Morgan Stanley executives. Known for its fast execution engine and futures trading products, Phemex has built a reputation among professional traders. Their welcome bonus is structured to reward active futures trading with tiered deposit and volume milestones.

name: Bitunix
requirements: Register without KYC. Deposit qualifying amount to unlock welcome bonus. Additional rewards available through futures trading activity.
riskNotes: Bitunix is a newer exchange. Exercise due diligence before depositing significant funds. Bonus conditions and terms subject to change.
shortDescription: Bitunix offers a no-KYC welcome bonus of up to 1,000 USDT with competitive futures trading fees for users seeking quick and easy exchange access.
longDescription: Bitunix is an emerging crypto futures exchange offering competitive trading fees and a no-KYC approach for new users. While newer to the market, Bitunix has attracted traders looking for accessible derivatives trading with minimal verification requirements. Their welcome bonus rewards new users through deposit milestones.

name: LBank
bonusTitle: Up to 500 USDT New User Bonus
pros: Wide selection of altcoins including early listings
requirements: Register and complete KYC. Deposit qualifying amount and complete trading tasks to earn welcome bonus rewards up to 500 USDT.
riskNotes: LBank lists many low-cap tokens with high volatility risk. Bonus conditions and availability subject to change.
shortDescription: LBank offers new users a welcome bonus of up to 500 USDT with access to a wide range of altcoins and early token listings.
longDescription: LBank is a global crypto exchange founded in 2015 known for listing emerging altcoins and providing P2P trading services. Operating in over 100 countries, LBank appeals to users looking for early exposure to new token projects. Their welcome bonus is accessible after KYC completion and qualifying deposits.
